title: Conis Warns the Crew
description: The Going Merry and several crewmates are carried toward Upper Yard, turning Skypiea from a peaceful island into a survival trial.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Conis, Sanji, McKinley, Luffy, Narrator. The Going Merry and several crewmates are carried toward Upper Yard, turning Skypiea from a peaceful island into a survival trial.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: --Anyways, now things have become really complicated.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, why did you come back?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Is there a safe way back!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: All right! Sanji, get the lunch boxes!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You don't miss a thing, do you!?

summary: The Going Merry and several crewmates are carried toward Upper Yard, turning Skypiea from a peaceful island into a survival trial.
